text:
Created attachment 164909
initial source for archivers/minilzo

OK. Here's a close start for archivers/minilzo
Initial testing indicated that [at least] minilzo.c
will need some patching. But it's a good start. :)

I won't have anymore time for awhile. So if you,
or anyone else wants to hack on it. Feel free. :)

Happy New Year!

--Chris
